global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent sale announcement and clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale with significant discounts and free shipping.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Center graphic element
elements.description: A rectangular graphic element centered in the ad, possibly representing a product or feature.

elements.label: Center graphic element
elements.description: A smaller rectangular graphic element centered in the ad, likely complementing the main subject.

elements.label: Center graphic element
elements.description: Another rectangular graphic element centered in the ad, similar in style to the other center elements.

elements.label: Bottom graphic element
elements.description: A small rectangular graphic element located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Bottom graphic element
elements.description: A small circular graphic element located towards the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Discount and shipping info
elements.description: Text displaying a discount offer and shipping information, prominently placed in the center.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Main sale headline
elements.description: Bold text at the top of the ad announcing the sale, with a vibrant color to attract attention.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button at the bottom center of the ad encouraging users to take action.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge indicating a percentage discount, positioned at the bottom left of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, sale announcement, discount information, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by the main body text in the center, with the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Up to 40% off, Free shipping over $25, ThreadMark SALE, Order now, 30%
